'''Raxsus Nuli''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who nursed strong ambitions for [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] conquest.

Hoping to use the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-wide conflict that became known as the [[Jedi Civil War]] as cover, he began his plans for carving out an empire. Despite the broader threat posed by the Sith under [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]], Nuli was [[Prison/Legends|jailed]] by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], and his stockpile of [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] weapons and [[Armor/Legends|armor]] was auctioned away.
